query: 收到一条 P0 flavor-code 告警：Shell 工具执行失败，exit code 1。AlertManager webhook 已推送，请自动执行 code-level 根因分析。告警详情：service_name=flavor-code, alertname=FlavorToolFailure:Shell, tool=Shell, error_code=tool_error, workspace=C:\idea\myproject, git_commit=abc1234
P1 flavor-code 告警推过来了：Read 工具 permission_denied，尝试读取 C:\secrets\.env 被拒绝。service_name=flavor-code, alertname=FlavorToolFailure:Read, severity=warning, workspace=C:\Users\dev\backend

P0 flavor-code 告警：Edit 工具在 frontend-app 项目里应用 patch 失败，oldText not found in file。service_name=flavor-code, alertname=FlavorToolFailure:Edit, tool=Edit, error_code=tool_error, workspace=C:\idea\frontend-app, branch=feature/new-ui, commit=def5678。做代码级 RCA。
P1 flavor-code 告警：Write 工具被 security-check hook 拒绝。service_name=flavor-code, alertname=FlavorToolFailure:Write, error_code=hook_denied, workspace=C:\project\config。分析 hook 拒绝原因并给出修复方案。

P0 flavor-code 综合故障：同一 workspace C:\idea\backend-service 中 Shell 和 Grep 两个工具同时失败。Shell 报 command not found，Grep 报 invalid regex pattern。service_name=flavor-code, level=P0, branch=main, commit=ghi9012。判断是否是环境配置问题，输出 code-level RCA 报告。

P0 flavor-code 告警：ApplyPatch 在 monorepo 中执行 hunk mismatch at line 142。service_name=flavor-code, alertname=FlavorToolFailure:ApplyPatch, tool=ApplyPatch, error_code=tool_error, workspace=C:\idea\monorepo, branch=release/v2.0, commit=jkl3456。请做代码级根因分析并给出冲突解决建议。
